spec_match.rationale: The demo effectively showcases the syntax and rationale for nesting image-set() inside light-dark() to handle both color-scheme and DPR in one rule.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactive toggles that simulate both color scheme and device pixel ratio (DPR), which is necessary because DPR cannot be changed programmatically by the browser.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Parent blurb matches the image-set combo concept perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Thoroughly demonstrates all 4 permutations (light@1x, light@2x, dark@1x, dark@2x) using clearly labeled inline SVG data URIs.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Utilizes design system classes, layout patterns, and clean cards.

summary: A brilliant simulation demo that resolves the technical limitation of DPR testing by providing an interactive 4-way matrix simulation. Clean, compliant, and highly educational.
